content: جوزي غَبي، بِيِصَدَّق كُلّ حَاجَة صَاحِبُه بِقولها لُه
translations: eng:my husband is stupid, he believes everything his friends say to him

transcriptions.arabizi: gooz|i ghaby, biyisadda' kullahaega saahib|uh bi'oolhae|l|uh
